name: fluence_0p5_30ps_ttm_periodic_slab_diagnostic
notes: TTM-MD periodic slab diagnostic, not strict free-surface ablation. Verifies electron-lattice coupling and temperature evolution only.

name: fluence_0p5_20ps_free_surface_ablation_debug
notes: Short stability debug after lost-atoms at 15 ps. Uses p p fs, no fix ttm/mod, 0.0005 ps timestep, and a smooth 0-30 ps Gaussian heat pulse.

name: fluence_0p5_20ps_free_surface_ablation_debug_weaker_heat
notes: Weaker/shallower 20 ps free-surface debug: heat_scale=0.3, 5 layers over 0-5 nm, per-layer step caps, p p fs, no fix ttm/mod, dt=0.0005 ps.

name: fluence_0p5_20ps_free_surface_ablation_debug_weaker_heat_v2
notes: Weaker heat v2: heat_scale=0.2, 5 layers 0-5 nm, tighter caps [20,15,12,10,8] eV/step, target heated p95 <= 5000 K at 20 ps.

name: fluence_0p5_50ps_free_surface_ablation_stable_debug
notes: Intermediate stability debug. Run only after the 20 ps case has no lost atoms or nonphysical KE/vz spikes.

name: fluence_0p5_100ps_free_surface_ablation_quickcheck
notes: Intermediate free-surface quickcheck before the expensive 300 ps case. Uses p p fs, no fix ttm/mod, smaller timestep, and smooth Beer-Lambert lattice heating.

name: fluence_0p5_300ps_free_surface_ablation
notes: Main free-surface ablation morphology case. Uses p p fs and an equivalent Beer-Lambert lattice heat source, not fix ttm/mod.
